constants.name: Buffer_Size
constants.code:
Buffer_Size : constant System.Storage_Elements.Storage_Count :=
                System.Storage_Elements.Storage_Count
                  ((Element_Type'Size + System.Storage_Unit - 1) /
                                                   System.Storage_Unit);

subprograms.name: Read
subprograms.code: procedure Read (Buffer : Buffer_Type; Item : out Element_Type)

subprograms.name: Write
subprograms.code: procedure Write (Buffer : out Buffer_Type; Item : Element_Type)
